title: Open  - 13 April 2026 - Part 27
content:
I am of the opinion that of late many                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               that we can’t take criticism even when it is in agenda he doesn’t believe in?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           Besides, how thin-skinned have we become foolish. Why would a filmmaker choose an                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           how can you say it’s an anti-India film?

would pursue an agenda aligned with us is                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             the makers, actors and producers are Indian, filmmaker. To assume that every filmmaker
